F

findByEmailAndEnabledTrue(String) - Method in interface com.orasaka.identity.repository.OrasakaUserRepository
Resolves an enabled user by their email address.
findByEmailAndEnabledTrueWithAssociations(String) - Method in interface com.orasaka.identity.repository.OrasakaUserRepository
Resolves an enabled user by email, left join-fetching their authorities and interceptions.
findByIdUserId(String) - Method in interface com.orasaka.identity.repository.OrasakaUserInterceptionRepository
Resolves all active interceptions for a given user.
findByIdWithAssociations(String) - Method in interface com.orasaka.identity.repository.OrasakaUserRepository
Resolves a user profile by unique identifier, left join-fetching their authorities and interceptions.
findByTokenHashAndUsedFalse(String) - Method in interface com.orasaka.identity.repository.OrasakaVerificationTokenRepository
Resolves an unused verification token by its hash.
findByUserId(String) - Method in interface com.orasaka.identity.repository.OrasakaAuthorityRepository
Finds all authorities configured for a given user.

getAuthorities() - Method in class com.orasaka.identity.entity.OrasakaUserEntity
Gets the security authorities entities assigned to the user.

Gets the expiration timestamp bounds.

Gets the generated unique ID.

Gets the unique identifier of the rate limiting tier.

Gets the unique user identifier.

getId() - Method in class com.orasaka.identity.entity.OrasakaVerificationTokenEntity

I

id() - Method in record class com.orasaka.identity.domain.User
Returns the value of the id record component.
IdentityConfig - Class in com.orasaka.identity.config
Spring Configuration for the orasaka-identity module.
IdentityConfig() - Constructor for class com.orasaka.identity.config.IdentityConfig
 
IdentityInfrastructureProperties - Record Class in com.orasaka.identity.config
Configuration properties for passive generic identity workflows in Orasaka.
IdentityInfrastructureProperties(IdentityInfrastructureProperties.EmailVerification, IdentityInfrastructureProperties.Interceptions) - Constructor for record class com.orasaka.identity.config.IdentityInfrastructureProperties
Creates an instance of a IdentityInfrastructureProperties record class.
IdentityInfrastructureProperties.EmailVerification - Record Class in com.orasaka.identity.config
Settings for the email verification subsystem.
IdentityInfrastructureProperties.Interceptions - Record Class in com.orasaka.identity.config
Settings for the user interception engine.
IdentityService - Class in com.orasaka.identity.service
Core identity service responsible for user lifecycle management: profile resolution, self-service registration, preference persistence, password-based authentication, user interceptions, and token-based email verification.
IdentityService(OrasakaUserRepository, OrasakaAuthorityRepository, OrasakaVerificationTokenRepository, OrasakaUserInterceptionRepository, BCryptPasswordEncoder, IdentityInfrastructureProperties, ApplicationEventPublisher, PlatformTransactionManager) - Constructor for class com.orasaka.identity.service.IdentityService
Constructs the service with its JPA repositories, encoding, and event publishing dependencies.
interceptions() - Method in record class com.orasaka.identity.config.IdentityInfrastructureProperties
Returns the value of the interceptions record component.
Interceptions(boolean, Map<String, String>) - Constructor for record class com.orasaka.identity.config.IdentityInfrastructureProperties.Interceptions
Creates an instance of a Interceptions record class.
InvalidRequestException - Exception Class in com.orasaka.identity.exception
Exception thrown when input parameters for a request or command are invalid or missing.
InvalidRequestException(String) - Constructor for exception class com.orasaka.identity.exception.InvalidRequestException
Constructs a new exception with the specified detail message.

R

rateLimitTier() - Method in record class com.orasaka.identity.domain.User
Returns the value of the rateLimitTier record component.
register(String, String, String, String) - Method in class com.orasaka.identity.service.IdentityService
Registers a new user account, initiating verification or interceptions if configured.
resolveInterception(UUID, String, String, Map<String, Object>) - Method in class com.orasaka.identity.service.IdentityService
Resolves an active interception by merging replies and deleting the block row.
Role - Interface in com.orasaka.identity.domain
Domain-driven RBAC hierarchy using Java 21 Sealed Interfaces.
Role.Admin - Record Class in com.orasaka.identity.domain
Represents the Admin role in the system.
Role.Guest - Record Class in com.orasaka.identity.domain
Represents the Guest role in the system.
Role.User - Record Class in com.orasaka.identity.domain
Represents the User role in the system.

updatePreferences(String, Map<String, Object>) - Method in class com.orasaka.identity.service.IdentityService
Merges preferences map into user preferences.
user() - Method in record class com.orasaka.identity.event.UserRegisteredEvent
Returns the value of the user record component.
User - Record Class in com.orasaka.identity.domain
Immutable domain representation of an Orasaka user, carrying identity, security authorities, and multi-modal AI execution preferences.
User() - Constructor for record class com.orasaka.identity.domain.Role.User
Creates an instance of a User record class.
User(UUID, String, String, boolean, Set<String>, Map<String, Object>) - Constructor for record class com.orasaka.identity.domain.User
Overloaded constructor for backwards compatibility without active interceptions or rate limit tier.
User(UUID, String, String, boolean, Set<String>, Map<String, Object>, List<String>) - Constructor for record class com.orasaka.identity.domain.User
Overloaded constructor for backwards compatibility without a rate limiting tier.
User(UUID, String, String, boolean, Set<String>, Map<String, Object>, List<String>, String) - Constructor for record class com.orasaka.identity.domain.User
Compact canonical constructor that applies defensive defaults and enforces invariants.
UserAlreadyExistsException - Exception Class in com.orasaka.identity.exception
Exception thrown when a user registration fails because the requested email is already registered.
UserAlreadyExistsException(String) - Constructor for exception class com.orasaka.identity.exception.UserAlreadyExistsException
Constructs a new exception with the specified detail message.
username() - Method in record class com.orasaka.identity.domain.User
Returns the value of the username record component.
UserRegisteredEvent - Record Class in com.orasaka.identity.event
Event published when a new user registers in the Orasaka identity module.

Creates an instance of a UserRegisteredEvent record class.

V

verifyToken(String) - Method in class com.orasaka.identity.service.IdentityService
Verifies a verification token and enables the target user account.
